items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 interesting story plus the character des
items.summary: interesting story plus the character design is just so gorgeous and i would say this game deserve more attention bro n for me ni game f2p friendly jg trs buat yg suka game modelan reverse dan chaos zero turn based yg mekaniknya pake card harus coba ni game fix
items.author: Arfaa Yudha
